response.justification: While the candidate meets educational requirements and has 20 years of professional experience including current involvement with AI infrastructure, the resume lacks the specialized expertise required for this Principal-level role. Critical gaps include no demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture optimization, deep neural network workload analysis, or hardware-software co-design—the core responsibilities of this position.
strengths: Meets educational requirement (Bachelor's CS + 20 years professional experience)
Current Staff-level role at Google with AI-agent infrastructure exposure
Track record of low-latency optimization (async I/O, caching at Dunnhumby handling millions req/sec)
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP modeling, or chip-level design experience
No GPU architecture, AI accelerator, or deep neural network optimization background
Career primarily focused on full-stack web/backend development rather than systems-level performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Seniority level and general software engineering strength
